chunks.text: Technical Reports - Shyam Parekh. Quick Simulation Method for Excessive Backlogs in Networks of Queues (M86/74) by Shyam Parekh and Jean Walrand.
chunks.question: What is the title of the technical report M86/74?
chunks.answer: Quick Simulation Method for Excessive Backlogs.

chunks.text: Instability and Geometric Transience of the Aloha Protocol (M86/73) by Shyam Parekh, F. Schoute and Jean Walrand.
chunks.question: What is the title of the technical report M86/73?
chunks.answer: Instability and Geometric Transience of the Aloha Protocol.
